name: Bay Sailing Experience
reason: Sailing past the Golden Gate Bridge creates a shared memorable experience that teams talk about for months.

name: Escape Room Challenge
venue: Palace Games, Palace of Fine Arts
reason: Collaborative puzzle-solving in a historic setting that reveals team dynamics and communication styles.

name: Golden Gate Park Bike Tour
reason: Leisurely group bike ride through the park with stops at gardens and landmarks, encouraging casual conversation.

name: Cooking Class — Dim Sum
reason: Hands-on dim sum making in small groups builds collaboration and produces something everyone shares.

name: Muir Woods Nature Hike
reason: Walking among ancient redwoods provides a calming reset that promotes reflective conversation.

name: Improv Comedy Workshop
reason: Yes-and improv exercises build psychological safety and active listening skills in a fun environment.

name: Street Art Walking Tour
reason: Guided walk through the Mission's murals sparks creative discussion and exposes teams to diverse perspectives.

name: Yoga & Meditation Session
reason: Morning mindfulness session sets a calm, focused tone for the day's work sessions.

name: Alcatraz Island Tour
reason: Iconic SF experience with audio tour that gives teams shared stories and conversation starters.

name: Board Game Tournament
reason: Low-pressure competitive play in small groups encourages strategic thinking and natural bonding.
